name: report_environment
full_help:
report_environment

Description: 
Report system information.

Syntax: 
report_environment  [-file <arg>] [-format <arg>] [-append] [-return_string]
                    [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-file]           Write system information to specified file.
  [-format]         Specifies how to format the report. Default is 'text', 
                    another option is 'xml'. Only applies if -file is used. 
                    If xml output is used, -append is not allowed.
                    Default: text
  [-append]         Append report to existing file
  [-return_string]  Return report content as a string value
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report
